title: AI’s Counterintuitive Future
hook: I think one of the most counterintuitive things about AI is that the models that seem the most impressive today might not be the ones that matter most in five years.
reason: It delivers a surprising, counterintuitive insight that hooks listeners immediately and sparks curiosity about AI’s trajectory.

title: Why Scaling Might Fail
hook: Most people assume that scaling is the only path forward, but that's actually a controversial take in the research community.
reason: By challenging a common belief, this clip sparks debate and engagement from both skeptics and supporters.

title: 2025 Agentic Systems Coming Soon!
hook: My prediction for 2025 is that we'll see the first truly agentic systems deployed in production at scale, not demos, actual production systems.
reason: A specific future forecast creates anticipation and positions the clip as a must-watch forecast.

title: Inside the Lab’s Secret Results
hook: Here's a story about a conversation I had with a researcher at a major lab.
reason: A personal, vulnerable anecdote offers authenticity and relatability, making it highly shareable.

title: Engineers Think AI Is Just Autocomplete
hook: The funny thing is, most software engineers I talk to are not worried at all.
reason: Humor combined with a surprising industry insight drives quick, repeatable sharing.
